/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/visual_comparison.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/visual_comparison.dir/visual_comparison.cpp.o -o visual_comparison  ../libmantle_renderer.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3
